pages.text: Hi！I'm Patrick (You can also call Pat) (◍•ᴗ•◍) Grade 9 AWEFUL competitive coder (USACO Gold), from Shanghai Currently at Canada… Identity V titan player (I don’t think anyone here knows this game) Total coding time (Since 2023/4/14)： Informatics major events (synced with luogu) AC 100 2022.5.1 Orange Name 2022.5.16 AC 200 2022.8.10 USACO Silver 733750\frac{733}{750}​750​​733​​ 2022.12.24 USACO Silver AK 2023.1.28 AC 300 2023.2.1 CCC 3775\frac{37}{75}​75​​37​​ 2023.2.15 TeamsCode Novice 9051100\frac{905}{1100}​1100​​905​​ 5th 2023.4.5 You're welcome to leave your name————
